heading: Control; regulations for care and management
label: 430b Control; regulations for care and management
text: Such park shall be under the control and direction of the Secretary of the Interior. The Secretary is authorized to prescribe from time to time such regulations for the care and management of such park as he may deem necessary.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 430a of this title
